column1: # question_type : Fill in the blanks | Error correction | Sentence Conversion |
#                 Sentence arrangement | Jumbled Sentences | Cloze | Short functional writing
# ── Grammar & Vocabulary — 2 marks — Fill in the blanks ──────────────────────

column5: She ___ (go) to school every day.
They ___ (be) happy when they heard the news.
By the time we arrived, the meeting ___ (already / start).
He ___ (not / finish) his homework yet.
If she ___ (study) harder, she would have passed the exam.
He go to the market every morning.
column6: He goes to the market every morning.

column5: She don't like coffee.
The team are working hard on the project.
column6: The team is working hard on the project.

column5: He has went to the store.
column6: He has gone to the store.

column5: Neither the students nor the teacher were present.
column6: Neither the students nor the teacher was present.

column5: Convert to plural: The child is playing in the park.
column6: The children are playing in the park.

column5: Convert to negative: She writes letters every week.
column6: She does not write letters every week.

column5: Convert to past perfect: She finishes the report before the deadline.
column6: She had finished the report before the deadline.

column5: Rearrange: evening / usually / he / reads / in / the / newspaper
column6: He usually reads the newspaper in the evening.

column5: Rearrange: by / had / they / time / arrived / the / already / we / left
column6: By the time we arrived, they had already left.

column5: Write a short note to your friend inviting them to your birthday party.
column6: Model: Dear [Name], I am happy to invite you to my birthday party on [date] at [time] at [place]. Please come and celebrate with me. Looking forward to seeing you. Regards, [Name]

column5: Write a short message to your teacher requesting an extension for your assignment.
column6: Model: Dear Sir/Madam, I am writing to request a two-day extension for the assignment due on [date]. I have been unwell and was unable to complete it on time. I will submit it by [new date]. Thank you for your understanding. Regards, [Student Name]

column5: Write a short notice for your college notice board announcing a study group session.
column6: Model: NOTICE — Study Group Session — All students of [Class] are invited to join a study group session on [topic] on [date] at [time] in [room]. Attendance is encouraged. For queries, contact [Name]. — [Date]
